assertions.assertion: Output contains 'AddBff()' with '.ConfigureOpenIdConnect' replacing the manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect setup
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know the v4 fluent API migration pattern
Without skill, an LLM might keep MapBffManagementEndpoints since it was explicit in the original code
Without skill, an LLM would not know the v4 syntax change

assertions.assertion: Output contains '.AddRemoteApis()' since V4 requires it for remote API endpoints
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know AddRemoteApis() is required in v4

assertions.assertion: Output preserves the original OIDC settings (Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType, scopes)
assertions.rationale: Any reasonable migration would preserve the functional settings
